ValidationRule.description: Either the Adjustment % or Amount can be applied to the invoice. Please ensure that value is selected only for one of them.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, NOT( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Adjustment__c ) ), NOT( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Adjustment_Amount__c ) ), leaseworks__Adjustment__c <> 0, leaseworks__Adjustment_Amount__c <> 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Either the Adjustment % or Amount can be applied to the invoice. Please ensure that value is selected only for one of them.
